description:
This application is offering a set of Excel formulas to calculate and check the domification of a horoscope using the seven main historical methods.
It is initially based on John D. North's program as described in his book: John D. North, Horoscopes and History, London: Warburg Institute, 1986, appendix 4, pp. 197-218, and its 2021 adaptation to Google Sheets.
name: Horosc for Excel
